data.title: Bitcoin sees increased short positions before possible Fed rate cut; over $6B in leveraged positions in jeopardy.
data.description: With the Federal Reserve's upcoming rate decision, Bitcoin remains relatively stable, trading within a narrow range. However, over $6 billion worth of leveraged positions are currently at risk in the market.

data.title: UL Solutions Inc. priced its secondary public offering of 12.5M Class A common stock shares at $78 per share.
data.description: In Northbrook, Illinois, UL Solutions Inc. disclosed the pricing of its underwritten public offering (NYSE: ULS), consisting of 12,500,000 shares of its Class A common stock. Priced at $78.00 per share, the offering, solely comprising secondary shares, will be sold by UL Standards & Engagement, the selling stockholder. Additionally, the underwriters hold a 30-day option to secure up to an extra 1,875,000 shares of Class A common stock.

data.title: Ryobi Systems success in Bangladesh: 20% productivity boost, 30% methane reduction in sustainable farming project.
data.description: Ryobi Systems Co., Ltd., AJI-CLE Co., Ltd., ANTAR Society for Development, and UGI LTD., collaborated on a project in Bangladesh from February to December 2025. The initiative focused on enhancing agriculture efficiency and productivity through agricultural DX and generating carbon credits. The project results were shared with local government officials, including the Additional Secretary of the Ministry of Agriculture, on December 2, 2025.
HealthEquity Inc. sees its price target increased to $129 by J.P. Morgan, up from $126.
Scotiabank boosts Snowflake’s stock target from $280 to $290.
30-year Japanese government bond yield falls to 3.385%, down 3.5 basis points.

data.title: Crown Reserve Acquisition Corp. I will allow separate trading of its Class A shares, warrants, and rights from Dec 9, 2025.
data.description: In a press release dated December 3, 2025, the Crown Reserve Acquisition Corp. I revealed its decision to allow holders of units from its initial public offering to commence separate trading of Class A ordinary shares, warrants, and rights starting from Tuesday, December 9, 2025. This move signifies a significant development for investors associated with the company.

data.title: IREN stock soars by 7% after $3.6B fundraising post Tuesday's slump.
data.description: On Wednesday, IREN concluded trading with a notable increase of almost 7%, bouncing back slightly from a significant decline the day before. This came after the company revealed its strategy for a new round of capital raising.

data.title: NTT DATA is opening six new AI-powered Cyber Defense Centers in India, UK, and USA by early 2026, to enhance cyber resilience.
data.description: NTT DATA, a prominent global company specializing in AI, digital business, and technology services, has revealed the establishment of four advanced autonomous Cyber Defense Centers in Bengaluru, Hyderabad, Noida, and Mumbai. These centers are boosted by AI technologies. Furthermore, NTT DATA plans to open two more centers in Birmingham, UK, by December 2025, and in Dallas, USA, by January 2026. This initiative underscores NTT DATA's commitment to revamping cybersecurity for the AI era through purpose-built facilities.

data.title: Visa, Pismo, and Circle partner to launch Vietnam's first AI-powered PayLater card, aiming to provide credit access to millions, with a phased rollout starting early 2026.
data.description: In a recent announcement in Singapore, Visa and Pismo revealed a strategic partnership with Circle Asia Technologies, a leading credit-focused neobank in Southeast Asia, to provide access to credit for millions in Vietnam. The collaboration aims to introduce Vietnam's first AI-driven PayLater card through Circle, revolutionizing transparency, personalization, and user experience in the financial sector. The launch is set to commence in early 2026 through a phased rollout, paving the way for innovative financial solutions in the region.

data.title: Mitsubishi Electric creates tech to generate millimeter-scale flow using 10μm microbubbles, reducing power needs for water cooling.
data.description: In Tokyo, Mitsubishi Electric Corporation (TOKYO: 6503) revealed a groundbreaking achievement today - the development of a pioneering technology that generates millimeter-scale flow within a channel. This innovation utilizes microbubbles with a diameter of 10μm as the driving force. The technology, created in collaboration with Suzuki & Namura Laboratory at Faculty of Engineering and Graduate School of Engineering, Kyoto University, is set to revolutionize water cooling systems by potentially eliminating the need for power-consuming external pumps. This advancement marks a significant milestone in the field of engineering.

data.title: BlackRock and Coinbase CEOs highlight Bitcoin's growth, discuss U.S. laws and tokenization.
data.description: Executives from BlackRock and Coinbase recently engaged in a joint interview, delving into discussions surrounding Bitcoin, U.S. legislation, tokenization, and market trends. The conversation, which featured prominent leaders from both companies, shed light on crucial aspects of the cryptocurrency industry. Topics ranged from the current state of Bitcoin to the impact of U.S. regulations on the market. The interview provided valuable insights into the growing trend of tokenization and offered perspectives on the latest market developments. Overall, the discussion between the high-profile executives garnered attention from industry professionals and enthusiasts alike, further highlighting the significance of these subjects in the financial world.

data.title: Binance co-founder urges parents to secure children's access to crypto in "worst case" scenario. Don't leave coins inaccessible.
data.description: Changpeng "CZ" Zhao, co-founder of Binance (CRYPTO: BNB), emphasized the significance of ensuring children's access to cryptocurrency in extreme situations. This comes after the introduction of Binance Junior, a sub-account controlled by parents. CZ highlighted the importance of safeguarding children's future by not leaving cryptocurrency inaccessible to them and future generations. He advised users to take precautions against worst-case scenarios and not to lock their crypto assets in a way that children cannot access. CZ urged the community to prioritize protecting their children's access to cryptocurrency. The full article can be found on Benzinga.com.
